  • EMAIL DELIVERY ONLY: Download your extended warranty certificate by sharing your device details. The link is available under buyer/seller messages at www.amazon.in/msg and is also sent to your Amazon registered email ID
  • REPAIR OR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: We will either repair your device or give a replacement. The replacement device will be provided at the discretion of Onsitego on the basis of the depreciated value of your device
  • HASSLE-FREE SERVICE: ‘No Questions Asked’ Repair Policy | Zero-Paperwork Claims Process | Free Pick & Drop or At-Home Service
  • LIMIT OF LIABILITY: Onsitego liability is limited to the depreciated value of the device as detailed in our T&C document
  • HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: Service by Onsitego authorised service engineers with high-quality spare parts every single time.
  • EASY TO REQUEST SERVICE: Download the Onsitego app to raise a repair request within 10 seconds or visit our website. You can also call us or chat with us on 99205 99206
  • COVERAGE: The plan covers all defects & malfunctions under the original manufacturer’s warranty. The plan starts the day after the manufacturer’s warranty ends or on the 366th day from the date of device purchase, whichever is later. It does not cover physical or liquid damage, accessories, preventive maintenance or consumables. It also does not cover parts that are not covered under the standard manufacturer’s warranty
  • ELIGIBILITY: The plan can be purchased only for new devices bought on the Amazon platform and WITHIN 30 days of device purchase or before the expiration of the manufacturer's warranty, whichever occurs first. You can purchase this plan only for devices that have AT LEAST 1 Authorised Service Centre anywhere in India. The sum of the manufacturer’s warranty and extended warranty CANNOT EXCEED 5 YEARS. This plan does not cover products or devices purchased or used for COMMERCIAL purposes

    About this item

    • Power and Heating: The Themisto 20W Glue Gun is powered by a 20-watt electric heating element that ensures quick and consistent melting of glue sticks. This provides users with a steady flow of hot adhesive, making it suitable for both precision work and larger bonding tasks.
    • Ergonomic Design: This glue gun boasts an ergonomic design with a comfortable grip, making it easy to hold and control during use. The lightweight construction ensures minimal hand fatigue, allowing for extended periods of use without discomfort.
    • Trigger Feed Mechanism: Equipped with a trigger feed mechanism, this glue gun offers precise control over the glue flow. Squeezing the trigger allows for easy dispensing of adhesive, and releasing it stops the flow immediately, preventing unwanted drips.
    • Compatibility with Glue Sticks: The Themisto 20W Glue Gun works with standard 7mm glue sticks, which are widely available in various adhesive types, such as hot melt, low-temperature, and high-temperature glues. This compatibility provides users with flexibility in choosing the appropriate adhesive for their specific project.

    Product information
    From the Brand
    Reviews
    THEMISTO 20 Watt Mini Hot Melt Glue Gun with 10 Glue Sticks for DIY Art and Crafts…

    Product Description

    INSTRUCTION TO USE:

    Insert the Glue Stick

    Insert the Themisto 7mm Glue Stick in the Glue Gun and let the Glue Gun rest on Stand.

    Preheat

    Keep the Gun for 3-5 minutes and let it preheat for better and smooth flow of Glue.

    Gluing Process

    Press the trigger continuously to squeeze out Glue and apply on the surfaces to be joint.

    While Not using

    When the Gluing process is finished unplug the Glue Gun and let it cooldown before storage, Don't take out Glue Sticks while storage.

    Themisto TH-GG20B Hot Melt Glue Gun With 10 Super strong Gumming Glue sticks |20 W |

    The Themisto 20 Watt Hot Melt Glue Gun is a powerful and efficient tool for all your adhesive needs. With a robust 20-watt heating element, it quickly melts glue sticks, ensuring a fast and reliable bond. Its ergonomic design offers comfortable handling during extended use, and the built-in safety features make it user-friendly.

    This glue gun is perfect for various DIY projects, crafts, and repairs, providing a dependable and precise adhesive application for a wide range of materials. Whether you're a hobbyist or professional, the Themisto 20 Watt Hot Melt Glue Gun is an indispensable tool for your bonding tasks.

    With high-tech PTC heating unit, it can heat up very quickly, also with the engineering class plastic material of glue gun body, it is very safe to use this product for everyone.

    Features:

    • Rapid heating
    • Safe and Efficient
    • Strong and Reliable
    • Stainless steel stand
    • Easy to use
    • Multiple uses

    No Touching

    The nozzle of Glue Gun reaches high temperatures while operating. Do not touch it or use it near inflammable or explosive materials.

    Don't Hold Upwards

    Never Hold the Glue Gun in upward position. The melted Glue may flow backwards and damage the Gun's internal parts.

    Don't take out the Glue stick

    After using the Glue Gun ,Keep the Glue stick inside the Gun. Don't try to pull it out, It will damage the Gun's Trigger Function.

    Storage Instructions

    Before storing the Gun let it cool to room temperature. Store at dry and ventilated Place away from moisture.

    What is in the box?

  • Hot Glue gun 10 Glue sticks

    How are ratings calculated?
    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Customers say

    Customers find the glue gun to be of good quality and value for money, particularly noting it's useful for small DIY projects and easy to use. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find it suitable for kids' craft usage, others note it needs smaller glue sticks. The heating time and sticking performance also get mixed reviews, with some saying it heats quickly while others report it takes forever to heat up, and several customers mention the glue doesn't stick properly.

      Product Summary: THEMISTO 20 Watt Mini Hot Melt Glue Gun with 10 Glue Sticks for DIY Art and Crafts…

      From THEMISTO

      4.2 out of 5 stars, 3,759 ratings

      Customer reviews

      600+ bought in past week

      Price

      One-time purchase: ₹188.00 69% Savings

      List Price: ₹599.00

      Inclusive of all taxes

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • Power and Heating: The Themisto 20W Glue Gun is powered by a 20-watt electric heating element that ensures quick and consistent melting of glue sticks. This provides users with a steady flow of hot adhesive, making it suitable for both precision work and larger bonding tasks.
      • Ergonomic Design: This glue gun boasts an ergonomic design with a comfortable grip, making it easy to hold and control during use. The lightweight construction ensures minimal hand fatigue, allowing for extended periods of use without discomfort.
      • Trigger Feed Mechanism: Equipped with a trigger feed mechanism, this glue gun offers precise control over the glue flow. Squeezing the trigger allows for easy dispensing of adhesive, and releasing it stops the flow immediately, preventing unwanted drips.
      • Compatibility with Glue Sticks: The Themisto 20W Glue Gun works with standard 7mm glue sticks, which are widely available in various adhesive types, such as hot melt, low-temperature, and high-temperature glues. This compatibility provides users with flexibility in choosing the appropriate adhesive for their specific project.

      Product description

      THEMISTO 20w glue gun and make quick repairs, save by repairing your own items. Use this hot glue gun and melting sticks for quick emergency repairs on wood, glass, cards, fabric, plastics, ceramics, for Arts and Crafts, DIY Projects . Our glue gun heats up in 3 to 4 minutes, Leak Proof Glue Gun with Strong Gumming Glue Sticks. THEMISTO hot glue gun for crafts is an extremely helpful tool in terms of faster yet subtle adhesives. It dries quickly and gives you a strong bond for a plethora of applications which includes regular school projects, packaging, woodworking and recreational décor. With high-tech PTC heating unit, it can heat up very quickly, also with the engineering class plastic material of glue gun body, it is very safe to use this product for everyone
